title: 賀錦麗拒辭參議員 謝田：她不相信拜登「勝選」

replies.msg:
【新唐人北京時間2020年11月28日訊】美國民主黨總統候選人拜登自行宣布「勝選」已過去20天，「已當選」的副總統候選人賀錦麗（哈里斯）依然沒有宣布辭去聯邦參議員職務。美國教授謝田表示，這顯示連她都不相信自己和拜登已經「當選」。

美國南卡羅萊納大學艾肯商學院教授謝田日前在大紀元發表評論文章指，其實最不相信拜登已經「勝選」的，正是拜登的副手、野心勃勃的女政客賀錦麗。

在推特上，很多網友向賀錦麗提出類似質疑：當年奧巴馬贏得大選10天後，就辭去了聯邦參議員職務，現在拜登宣布「勝選」已經20天了，她為何仍沒有動靜？

https://www.ntdtv.com/b5/2020/11/27/a102997079.html/amp?__twitter_impression=true&fbclid=IwAR34a6r4O2ssyXYGWxBW0WswEepeD-O6Y9fJXHwYSrncgSjMAQx9rgcfyt8


VERIFY: Yes, Kamala Harris is still receiving Senate pay

WASHINGTON — Projected White House winners Joe Biden and Kamala Harris continue to meet with their transition team. One of the roles that will have to be filled will be Senator Harris’ seat in the Senate.

We keep getting questions about the presidential transition process. That’s why you have the Verify team: to get you the facts from vetted experts. Viewers asked us if Senator Harris is still being paid for that position?

Question:
Does Vice President-Elect Kamala Harris still receive a salary as a Senator?

Answer:
Yes, until she resigns.

https://www.wusa9.com/article/news/verify/verify-yes-kamala-harris-is-still-receiving-senate-pay/65-02451d24-aa56-4c1c-9ec0-b6f3f8fae686
